Player.title: Player
Player.description: Represents a player in the poker game.

rebuys.description: The total number of buy-ins and re-buys for the player.

blackCoins.description: The number of black coins the player has at the end of the game.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the player was created.

definition.description: Stores information for each player in the game.

params.name: playerId
params.description: The unique ID of the player document.
